How to Write a Perfect Wedding Card

30 real wedding messages you can copy-paste today. 5 pro writing tips from our card editors. Bad-vs-good comparisons so you can spot the generic stuff and write something they'll actually remember.

📝 30 copy-paste messages 💡 5 writing tips ✅ Bad vs Good examples ❓ FAQs answered
Jump to: 30 Messages 5 Writing Tips Bad vs Good FAQ Pick a Wedding Template

1 30 Wedding Messages You Can Steal Today

Click 📋 Copy to save to clipboard. Click 🎴 Use on a card to open a wedding template with this message ready to go.

01 ✍️ General
💍💗 Congratulations on your wedding day! Wishing you a lifetime of love and laughter.
🎴 Use on a card
02 ✍️ General
To the happy couple: may every day be as magical as today. Happy Wedding Day! ✨🥂
🎴 Use on a card
03 ✍️ General
Congratulations on tying the knot! Never lose the spark. 🔥❤️
🎴 Use on a card
04 ✍️ General
Wishing you a marriage filled with inside jokes, lazy Sundays, and forever hugs. 👰🤵💕
🎴 Use on a card
05 ✍️ General
Happy Wedding Day! Here's to the first of a million amazing years together. 💫🥳
🎴 Use on a card
06 ✍️ General
Congratulations on your wedding. Best decision ever — marrying your best friend. 💖
🎴 Use on a card
07 👩 For Her
To the most beautiful bride — congratulations! You look absolutely stunning today. 👰💕
🎴 Use on a card
08 👩 For Her
Happy wedding day, darling. I can't wait to grow old with you. 💍💗
🎴 Use on a card
09 👩 For Her
To my wife today and forever: I vow to love you more every day. 💙
🎴 Use on a card
10 👩 For Her
Congratulations, gorgeous! Today is just the beginning of our fairy tale. ✨🌹
🎴 Use on a card
11 👩 For Her
Happy Wedding Day, my love. You made me the happiest person alive. 💘
🎴 Use on a card
12 👩 For Her
Cheers to us! We did it, babe. I love you forever. 🥂💞
🎴 Use on a card
13 👨 For Him
To my groom, my forever — congratulations, handsome. I'm yours. 🤵💙
🎴 Use on a card
14 👨 For Him
Happy wedding day, babe. Today I married my best friend. 💍💕
🎴 Use on a card
15 👨 For Him
Congratulations, husband. I'll love you through football season, bad jokes, everything. 😂💙
🎴 Use on a card
16 👨 For Him
Today I said 'I do' to the love of my life. Happy Wedding Day! 💗✨
🎴 Use on a card
17 👨 For Him
You're my husband now! Congratulations, babe. Forever starts today. 🥰
🎴 Use on a card
18 👨 For Him
To my forever person — congratulations on being stuck with me. 😜❤️
🎴 Use on a card
19 👨👩👧 Family
To my daughter/son on your wedding day — my heart is so full. Congratulations! 💗💍
🎴 Use on a card
20 👨👩👧 Family
Congratulations on your wedding, you two. Welcome to the family, officially. 🤗💕
🎴 Use on a card
21 👨👩👧 Family
To my sister/brother: Congratulations on finding 'the one'. Couldn't be happier! 💖✨
🎴 Use on a card
22 👨👩👧 Family
Happy Wedding Day! Mom and Dad are so proud of the life you're building. 👨👩👧💙
🎴 Use on a card
23 👨👩👧 Family
Congratulations on your marriage, kids! You two were made for each other. 🥳❤️
🎴 Use on a card
24 👨👩👧 Family
To my cousin getting married — congratulations! Let's party! 🎉🥂
🎴 Use on a card
25 👯 Friends
To my bestie on her/his wedding day: I'M NOT CRYING YOU'RE CRYING 😭💕 Congratulations!
🎴 Use on a card
26 👯 Friends
Congratulations on your wedding! Where's my official 'Maid of Honour/Best Man' trophy? 🏆😂
🎴 Use on a card
27 👯 Friends
To the best couple ever — Happy Wedding Day! Can't wait for all the future adventures. 🚀💖
🎴 Use on a card
28 👯 Friends
Congratulations! You owe me a lifetime of anniversary dinners. 🍽️💍
🎴 Use on a card
29 👯 Friends
Happy Wedding Day, you two! Thanks for letting me be part of your beautiful story. 📖💕
🎴 Use on a card
30 👯 Friends
Drinks, dancing, and 'I do's' — best wedding ever. Congratulations! 🥳🥂
🎴 Use on a card

2 5 Pro Tips for Writing Wedding Cards That Get Saved

After editing 10,000+ greeting cards, these are the 5 patterns that separate "nice" cards from "I kept this on my fridge for 3 years" cards.

  1. 💡 Congratulate BOTH partners by name (not just the bride).
  2. 💡 Acknowledge the family joining together.
  3. 💡 Share one tiny, specific memory of you two as a couple.
  4. 💡 Mention something practical about marriage ('May the remote wars be ever in your favour').
  5. 💡 End with a toast-style, spoken-friendly sentence since it'll likely be read aloud.

3 Bad vs Good: Wedding Card Messages, Side by Side

The difference between a forgotten card and a remembered one is usually 2 specific sentences. Here's what that looks like in practice.

❌ Don't write this
Congrats on getting married!
✅ Write this instead
To Alex & Jordan — 6 years ago you matched on a terrible dating app and now you're MARRIED. We always knew. 💍 Congratulations!
❌ Don't write this
Wishing you a happy marriage.
✅ Write this instead
May your marriage be filled with pizza on Friday nights, dance parties in the kitchen, and the remote wars always going your way (50/50).
❌ Don't write this
Best wishes on your special day.
✅ Write this instead
Best wishes on forever starting TODAY. Remember — marriage is just really long sleepovers with your favourite person. 💕

4 Wedding Card Writing — FAQ

The questions we get asked 4–5 times a week about writing wedding cards.

Do I have to write to both people?

YES. Even if you only know one, name them both. "To Sam & Alex," not just "Hi Sam." They are a team now.

How to address a same-sex wedding?

Exactly the same. "To [Name] & [Name]" — no special rules, just respect their names and pronouns.

Funny or formal for a wedding card?

Depends on the couple. If they used Comic Sans on their invite: go wild with jokes. If the invite was letterpress & linen: stay elegant.

Wedding gift + card — do I still write the note?

Always. The note is what they'll find in the box 10 years from now and cry over. Not the toaster.

5 Pick a Wedding Template & Send in 60 Seconds

All templates are free to design, personalise, and preview. No account needed.
